item.title: ancient spirits told me to post this
item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: A nice addition to THT
item.description: I really like this song but couldn’t find this specific remix of it. I was able to find both songs that were used though. That’s about as far as I got with my search. Most Viral edit: Video Source is @TaoBaiBaiYa from YouTube: https://youtube.com/shorts/TqhQunzymoA She also has an instagram that others have pointed out in the comments @taobaiyaa : https://www.instagram.com/taobaiyaa/ For the remix of this song: status is still unknown But I did find the female vocals song that seemed to be used as well as the main song. My thinking is this is a custom remix made specifically for this short form video. I think it would be nice to have a full version if possible. I’m not very good at using DAWs, yet so maybe someone more talented and knowledgeable is up for the task? Female vocals song: https://youtu.be/Jd5GaSPeNJY Main song: https://youtu.be/y-4hJN4brtk?si=hr_PfIixBvv-xyKc
item.dc:creator: Mal1t1a

item.title: Tools dump, and other gadgets
item.description:
1 : cards distributor
2 : marking tool
3 : portable power station
4 : rain chains
5 : Digital Angle Finder Magnetic
6 : car mat cleaning
7 : The Ultimate Produce Protectors You Never Knew You Needed
8 : Universal Furniture Corner Connectors
9 : vintage bun divider
10 : What is so mighty about it ?
11 : High precision ruler
12 : game-changing nut splitter
13 : The Lazy Man's Broom
14 : Television with a mosaic-style display
15 : Imagine day naps
16 : Genius or gimmick ?
18 : may be nice indeed
19 : Say goodbye to achy knees
20 : The possibilities are endless
21 : Chopped Chicken Salad That guy low-left must feel totally useless...
22 : truly satisfying I just bought one
23 : Bearing Removal Tool
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: TOS Vulcan Cosplay
item.description: Crafted this wig was one of my favorite things to do. I'm more of a TNG girl than a TOS, but have always loved the look of the TOS uniforms. Also, before I get hounded again... It's a mirror.
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.description: Storytime! So THIS was going to be the original BONUS panel to this comic, but "Woman Yelling at Cat" meme was the hot-ticket at the time so hubby suggested doing that instead. A classic was born!

item.title: Thanksgiving clean up saved Imgur posts
item.dc:creator: RubyMoonNite

item.description: Tiny octopus may be hibernating, but that doesn't mean he doesn't still keep an eye on you weirdos. The tiniers are away with their mom, so, making buffalo ranch wings with a side of stir fried cabbage. Be well imgur. Love to a few of you, Best Wishes to most, a hearty go fuck yourself to a select few (you know who you are).
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Sorry for the lack of mentally healthy dumps lately
item.description: But I hear you guys like thigh highs. -comet
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

item.title: I dun messed up.
item.description: I really just didn't feel like seeing family (trumpers) this year. My wife works grave shift tonight. I was supposed to go to Thanksgiving dinner alone. She always sleeps before a shift, normally till 4:30. The plan was to just say i left early and got home right before she woke up. She woke up real early. She's currently talking with her sister on the phone. She just sent me a text saying she's now "on call" for work tonight. Edit: On the upside, I get to hear her singing to our dog now. God I'll miss her when she divorces me. Edit: I told her I was home and came downstairs. She laughed more than she got upset. I will be promptly putting up the new curtains she picked out. Edit: No we are not in divorce territory. That was a joke/panic attack
item.dc:creator: 5omeWhiteGuy

item.title: Happy THThanksgiving you degenerates!
item.description: Let's discuss dessert...
item.dc:creator: Randomice

item.title: Need a break? (+ Cat Tax)
item.description:
Need a break from life? I got you! I know I said I wouldn’t be posting on Tuesday, Thursday and Friday but felt today was an exception! <3 I recorded holiday harp content like Carol of The Bells, Canon in D and a few random things like this warm up for Imgur, Instagram, Shorts etc next month and decided I’d post this one now for those who need a break from whatever they’ve got going on today! Im at my Nanas today and I could burn this place down from just overstimulation and the haze of stale opinions but we get to take food home soooo. For extra escapism: Stream all my music on Bandcamp, Spotify etc https://hyperfollow.com/sursie
Cat Tax: Buttons demanding to know WHY she was disturbed this morning! How dare I take this photo before she had time to prepare? I know… /s
item.dc:creator: SursieMetzger
